projectIntegrations.title: Project Integrations
projectIntegrations.subtitle: Connect your project with external tools and services to streamline your workflow.
projectIntegrations.githubSectionSubtitle: Synchronize tasks with GitHub issues and enable two-way sync.
projectIntegrations.discordSectionSubtitle: Send project task updates into a Discord channel with a webhook.
projectIntegrations.genericWebhookSectionSubtitle: Send project task events to any HTTP endpoint as JSON.
projectIntegrations.slackSectionSubtitle: Send project task updates into a Slack channel with an incoming webhook.

projectVisibility.title: Visibility
projectVisibility.subtitle: Control who can view and access your project.
projectVisibility.sectionSubtitle: Toggle public access and share the public URL.
projectVisibility.publicAccessHint: Allow anyone with the URL to view this project
projectVisibility.publicUrlHint: Share this link if the project is public

projectWorkflow.title: Workflow
projectWorkflow.subtitle: Configure board columns and automation rules for this project.
projectWorkflow.columnsDescription: Manage the columns that appear on your board. Drag to reorder. Turn on "Done column" for stages that represent completed work.
projectWorkflow.automationDescription: Map integration events to columns. When an event occurs, the linked task moves to the specified column.

columnEditor.doneColumnTooltip: Treat this as a done column

validation.webhookInvalid: Enter a valid Slack webhook URL

discordIntegration.eventsHint: Choose which project changes should post to Discord.

genericWebhookIntegration.connectionHint: Send task events to your own endpoint as JSON. A signed X-Kaneo-Signature header is included when a secret is configured.
genericWebhookIntegration.webhookHint: Kaneo sends POST requests with a JSON payload for each enabled event.
genericWebhookIntegration.secretHint: Optional. If provided, Kaneo signs the request body and sends the hex digest in the X-Kaneo-Signature header.
genericWebhookIntegration.secretHintConfigured: A signing secret is already configured ({{secret}}). Enter a new one to replace it.
genericWebhookIntegration.eventsHint: Choose which project changes should trigger outgoing webhooks.
